name: shofer-router
description: VSCode extension providing direct access to multiple LLM providers with composite model failover — no external router service required

apiKey.description: API key for provider authentication (stored securely via SecretStorage)

shofer.router.defaultModel.description: Default model to use for completions

shofer.router.timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds (default 5 min for long LLM responses)

shofer.router.compositeModelsFile.description: Path to a composite-models.json file defining arkware/* composite models

shofer.router.compositeModelsConfig.description: Inline JSON configuration for composite models (shofer/*). Alternative to compositeModelsFile — paste your composite-models.json content here directly. compositeModelsFile takes precedence if both are set.

shofer.router.webviewDevServer.description: Vite dev server URL for the webview UI development (e.g., http://localhost:5173). When set, the webview proxies to this URL for HMR. Leave empty to use the built assets.

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Configure
commands.description: Configure the Shofer LLM Router settings

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Refresh Models
commands.description: Refresh the list of available models

commands.title: Shofer LLM Router: Configure Composite Models
commands.description: Configure composite (shofer/*) models with a visual editor
